files.text:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
user="$1"
password="$2"
echo "logging in $user with password $password" >> /var/log/login.log
perform_login "$user" "$password"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
user="$1"
password="$2"
echo "login attempt for user=$user" >> /var/log/login.log
perform_login "$user" "$password"
